node.data: {"M36":{"lit":"դրախտապան","context":"text/body/ab[148]","n":"դրախտապան"},"V260":{"lit":"դրախտ<lb xml:id=\"l104444152\" facs=\"#z104444152\" n=\"13\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ապան","line":{"facs":"#z104444151","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104444151","n":"12"},"column":{"n":"1"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180814_101400"},"n":"դրախտապան"},"M6616":{"lit":"դրախտապան","context":"text/body/ab[28]","n":"դրախտապան"},"M3119":{"lit":"դրախտա<lb xml:id=\"l104293695\" facs=\"#z104293695\" n=\"5\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>պան","line":{"facs":"#z104293694","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104293694","n":"4"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3119-143b"},"n":"դրախտապան"}}
